name: Lumpkin County Parks and Recreation
description: Lumpkin County Parks and Recreation is a place to play pickleball in Dahlonega, GA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $5 out of county players, free for Lumpkin County residents

name: Lumpkin County Parks & Rec
description: Come play pickleball at Lumpkin County Parks & Rec in Dahlonega, GA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.
fees: Fee required — $5 out of county players, free for Lumpkin County residents

name: Pinetree Recreation Center
description: Pinetree Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dahlonega, GA. There are 8 courts. 6 are outdoors and 2 are indoors.
open_play_schedule: Beginner's clinic is offered on the first Sunday of each month at Lumpkin County Parks and Recreation on Riley Road at 2:30. Please RSVP at Lumpkin County Parks & Rec. 706-864-3622.

name: Yahoola Creek Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Yahoola Creek Tennis Center in Dahlonega, GA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
